title: Mailchimp vs Beehiiv (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Mailchimp vs Beehiiv: pricing, features, and which email marketing platform suits your needs best.
h1: Mailchimp vs Beehiiv: Complete Comparison Guide
intro: Both Mailchimp and Beehiiv offer freemium email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences and use cases. Mailchimp is an established all-in-one marketing suite ideal for small businesses, while Beehiiv is a modern newsletter platform built specifically for publishers and content creators. Understanding their differences will help you choose the right tool for your business.
choose_a_if: You're a small business or beginner looking for an affordable all-in-one marketing platform
You need landing pages, A/B testing, and advanced audience segmentation
You want the lowest entry price with a generous free tier for up to 500 subscribers
You're running an e-commerce store and need integrated marketing automation
choose_b_if: You're a newsletter publisher or media operator focused on growth and monetization
You need built-in ad network and referral program features
You want a larger free tier with 2,500 subscribers included
You prioritize modern design, better user experience, and strong customer reviews

faq.a: Neither is objectively better—it depends on your use case. Mailchimp excels as a comprehensive marketing platform for small businesses, while Beehiiv is purpose-built for newsletter publishers seeking growth and monetization. Mailchimp has more features overall, but Beehiiv has superior customer ratings and specialized newsletter tools.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Mailchimp or Beehiiv?
faq.a: Mailchimp is cheaper at entry level, starting at $13/month compared to Beehiiv's $39/month. Additionally, Mailchimp's free tier supports 500 subscribers while Beehiiv offers 2,500 subscribers free. However, Beehiiv may offer better value for newsletter publishers due to its monetization features.

faq.q: Can I switch from Beehiiv to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms allow you to export your subscriber lists and content. Most email marketing platforms support importing CSV files, making migration straightforward. Ensure you have proper consent from your subscribers before transferring their data between platforms.

faq.q: Does Mailchimp have better automation than Beehiiv?
faq.a: Mailchimp offers more advanced automation workflows as part of its broader marketing suite. Beehiiv's automation is more focused on newsletter operations and subscriber engagement rather than complex multi-channel marketing sequences.

faq.q: Which platform has better customer support?
faq.a: Beehiiv has significantly better customer satisfaction based on Trustpilot ratings (4.4 vs 1.5). While Mailchimp has more resources, Beehiiv's newer platform and focused user base may contribute to improved support experiences according to recent reviews.
